title: .aieng visual annotation layers
description: Structured visual annotation scaffold for .aieng packages. Maps feature IDs and topology IDs to visual roles. Not rendered geometry — this is annotation metadata only.

source_files.description: Package-relative paths of the source files used to build this annotation index.

layers.description: Ordered list of annotation layers. Each layer groups annotation items by visual role.

id.description: Stable unique annotation item ID within this package.

feature_id.description: Feature ID from graph/feature_graph.json that this annotation targets.

label.description: Human-readable label for display in a visual tool or AI reader.

feature_type.description: Feature type copied from the feature graph.

visual_role.description: Annotation visual role used to drive rendering style or highlighting.

status.description: Annotation status: candidate, protected, unknown, etc.

notes.description: Free-form notes about the annotation, e.g. maturity warnings.

forbidden_operations.description: Operations that are forbidden on this annotated feature.

allowed_operations.description: Operations that are allowed on this annotated feature.

reason.description: Reason for protection or special annotation.

simulation_type.description: Simulation annotation type: boundary_condition or load.

simulation_id.description: ID of the related boundary condition or load from simulation/setup.yaml.

$comment: Visual annotation layers are a scaffold only. No rendering, glTF, image, 3D geometry, mesh, or CAD kernel is used. This file can drive future viewers and helps AI readers map feature IDs to visual roles.
